apps.about:
## What's inside

The **Zeph Tour** is the official welcome app — a _hosted_ demo that renders its face on your Zeph while the companion drives it. It is the fastest way to see what a Zeph app can do, end to end.

### Five screens to explore

- **Welcome** — the home menu, your jumping-off point
- **Components** — every UI primitive on one scrolling surface
- **Playground** — four live `device ↔ companion` round-trips
- **Settings** — a greeting, accent, and clock glance driven by this app's own config
- **About** — a multi-screen scrolling text page

### Try the round-trips

From the Playground, fire a **Ping** and watch it return from the companion, or post a **Notify** that surfaces on the device. Edit a value on the _Settings_ screen and watch it sync live.

Built with the open [Zeph app SDK](https://github.com/zephclick/zeph).
apps.description: The official welcome tour — a hosted demo that shows off every device UI primitive, live device↔companion interactions, and per-app settings. Open it on a connected device to walk through the Welcome home, a Components showcase that renders the whole primitive palette on one scrolling surface, a Playground of four device↔companion round-trips, and a Settings screen driven by this app's own configuration.
